< Home >

GET restapi/personal/course/{courseId}/assessmentrecord/assessmentrecordpersonitems/v1?termId={termId}&paging.PageIndex={paging.PageIndex}&paging.PageSize={paging.PageSize}&searchText={searchText}&groupIds[0]={groupIds[0]}&groupIds[1]={groupIds[1]}&includePersonsNotInAnyGroups={includePersonsNotInAnyGroups}

Gets the persons with details and assessment values

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
courseId

The identifier of a course to get person items from.

 integer

Required
termId

[optional] Used for filtering assessment record elements by term.

 integer

None.
PageIndex

integer

None.
PageSize

integer

None.
searchText

[optional] Used for searching for student names

 string

None.
groupIds

[optional] Used for filtering assessment record elements by group.

 Collection of integer

None.
includePersonsNotInAnyGroups

[Optional] bool to indicate whether to include persons not in any group

 boolean

Default value is False

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

List of persons filtered by groups or search text

EntityListOfItslearning.RestApi.Entities.AssessmentRecord.AssessmentRecordPerson
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
EntityArray

Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.AssessmentRecord.AssessmentRecordPerson

None.
Total

integer

None.
CurrentPageIndex

integer

None.
PageSize

integer

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "EntityArray": [
    {
      "PersonAssessments": [
        {
          "GradeBookItemId": 1,
          "IsExempt": true,
          "IsManualAssessmentRequired": true,
          "Score": 1.1,
          "Scale": 1.1,
          "OverwrittenAssessmentItemId": 1,
          "OverwrittenScore": 1.1,
          "AnswerSubmitted": true,
          "AttemptId": 1,
          "AnswerDateTime": "2026-03-07T16:36:58Z",
          "AssessmentVisible": true,
          "ElementSessionStatus": 0,
          "ElementResultId": 1,
          "IsAnonymousSubmission": true,
          "ElementPersonCanTake": true
        },
        {
          "GradeBookItemId": 1,
          "IsExempt": true,
          "IsManualAssessmentRequired": true,
          "Score": 1.1,
          "Scale": 1.1,

          "OverwrittenScore": 1.1,
          "AnswerSubmitted": true,
          "AttemptId": 1,
          "AnswerDateTime": "2026-03-07T16:36:58Z",
          "AssessmentVisible": true,
          "ElementSessionStatus": 0,
          "ElementResultId": 1,
          "IsAnonymousSubmission": true,
          "ElementPersonCanTake": true
        }
      ],
      "PersonId": 1,
      "FirstName": "sample string 2",
      "LastName": "sample string 3",
      "FullName": "sample string 4",
      "ProfileUrl": "sample string 5",
      "AdditionalInfo": "sample string 6",
      "ProfileImageUrl": "sample string 7",
      "ProfileImageUrlSmall": "sample string 8"
    },
    {

  "Total": 1,
  "CurrentPageIndex": 2,
  "PageSize": 3
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<EntityList xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <CurrentPageIndex>2</CurrentPageIndex>
  <EntityArray>
    <AssessmentRecordPerson>
      <AdditionalInfo>sample string 6</AdditionalInfo>
      <FirstName>sample string 2</FirstName>
      <FullName>sample string 4</FullName>
      <LastName>sample string 3</LastName>
      <PersonId>1</PersonId>
      <ProfileImageUrl>sample string 7</ProfileImageUrl>
      <ProfileImageUrlSmall>sample string 8</ProfileImageUrlSmall>
      <ProfileUrl>sample string 5</ProfileUrl>
      <PersonAssessments>
        <PersonAssessmentValue>
          <AnswerDateTime>2026-03-07T16:36:58Z</AnswerDateTime>
          <AnswerSubmitted>true</AnswerSubmitted>
          <AssessmentVisible>true</AssessmentVisible>
          <AttemptId>1</AttemptId>
          <ElementPersonCanTake>true</ElementPersonCanTake>
          <ElementResultId>1</ElementResultId>
          <ElementSessionStatus>NotCompleted</ElementSessionStatus>
          <GradeBookItemId>1</GradeBookItemId>
          <IsAnonymousSubmission>true</IsAnonymousSubmission>
          <IsExempt>true</IsExempt>
          <IsManualAssessmentRequired>true</IsManualAssessmentRequired>
          <OverwrittenAssessmentItemId>1</OverwrittenAssessmentItemId>
          <OverwrittenScore>1.1</OverwrittenScore>
          <Scale>1.1</Scale>
          <Score>1.1</Score>
        </PersonAssessmentValue>
        <PersonAssessmentValue>
          <AnswerDateTime>2026-03-07T16:36:58Z</AnswerDateTime>
          <AnswerSubmitted>true</AnswerSubmitted>
          <AssessmentVisible>true</AssessmentVisible>
          <AttemptId>1</AttemptId>
          <ElementPersonCanTake>true</ElementPersonCanTake>
          <ElementResultId>1</ElementResultId>
          <ElementSessionStatus>NotCompleted</ElementSessionStatus>
          <GradeBookItemId>1</GradeBookItemId>

          <IsExempt>true</IsExempt>

          <OverwrittenAssessmentItemId>1</OverwrittenAssessmentItemId>
          <OverwrittenScore>1.1</OverwrittenScore>
          <Scale>1.1</Scale>
          <Score>1.1</Score>
        </PersonAssessmentValue>
      </PersonAssessments>
    </AssessmentRecordPerson>
    <AssessmentRecordPerson>
      <AdditionalInfo>sample string 6</AdditionalInfo>
      <FirstName>sample string 2</FirstName>
      <FullName>sample string 4</FullName>
      <LastName>sample string 3</LastName>
      <PersonId>1</PersonId>

      <ProfileUrl>sample string 5</ProfileUrl>

          <AssessmentVisible>true</AssessmentVisible>
          <AttemptId>1</AttemptId>
          <ElementPersonCanTake>true</ElementPersonCanTake>
          <ElementResultId>1</ElementResultId>
          <ElementSessionStatus>NotCompleted</ElementSessionStatus>
          <GradeBookItemId>1</GradeBookItemId>
          <IsAnonymousSubmission>true</IsAnonymousSubmission>
          <IsExempt>true</IsExempt>
          <IsManualAssessmentRequired>true</IsManualAssessmentRequired>
          <OverwrittenAssessmentItemId>1</OverwrittenAssessmentItemId>
          <OverwrittenScore>1.1</OverwrittenScore>

          <AnswerDateTime>2026-03-07T16:36:58Z</AnswerDateTime>
          <AnswerSubmitted>true</AnswerSubmitted>
          <AssessmentVisible>true</AssessmentVisible>
          <AttemptId>1</AttemptId>
          <ElementPersonCanTake>true</ElementPersonCanTake>
          <ElementResultId>1</ElementResultId>
          <ElementSessionStatus>NotCompleted</ElementSessionStatus>
          <GradeBookItemId>1</GradeBookItemId>
          <IsAnonymousSubmission>true</IsAnonymousSubmission>
          <IsExempt>true</IsExempt>

          <OverwrittenAssessmentItemId>1</OverwrittenAssessmentItemId>

      </PersonAssessments>
    </AssessmentRecordPerson>
  </EntityArray>
  <PageSize>3</PageSize>
  <Total>1</Total>
</EntityList>
